## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any other approaches? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or screenshots.
